title: calamus horrens
intro: Calamus horrens, also known as 'Wild Calamus', is a perennial plant species native to North America, belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Calamus horrens include its ability to ease digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems, like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Calamus horrens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and utilize its health benefits.
